function.name: hera_describe_device
function.description: Create a detailed description of the requested device.

device.description: device name is a required string parameter; if is missing do not invoke any function but return error message.

function.name: hera_get_device_actions
function.description: Retrieves the actions supported by a device.

device.description: device name is a required string parameter; if is missing do not invoke any function but return error message.

function.name: hera_list_devices
function.description: List all devices registered to HERA.

function.name: hera_read_temperature
function.description: Retrieves the current temperature reading from a specified zone within the home. If zone name parameter is not present into user prompt, use living room as default.

zone.description: is the location where the devices are placed; if you cannot determine the zone from user prompt use living room as default value.

function.name: hera_run_diagnose
function.description: Check that a device is running properly and is reacheable and return a diagnose report.

device.description: device name is a required string parameter; if is missing do not invoke any function but return error message.
